html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Eggplant Stalk is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Swirly Seeds (also named Eggplant Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow an Eggplant Stalk by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Autumn and  Spring, so in Winter and Summer it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Eggplant and 0-2 Swirly/Eggplant Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Eggplant, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Eggplants and 2-3 Swirly/Eggplant Seeds.

The Eggplant stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Eggplant stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Eggplant Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Eggplant Stalk grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Eggplant Stalk in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Eggplant Stalk''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Swirly Seeds|Swirly Seeds]] (also named Eggplant Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow an Eggplant Stalk by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Autumn]] and [[Winter| ]][[Spring]], so in [[Winter]] and [[Summer]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Eggplant/DST|Eggplant]] and 0-2 Swirly/Eggplant Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Eggplant|Giant Eggplant]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Eggplants and 2-3 Swirly/Eggplant Seeds.

The Eggplant stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Eggplant stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Eggplant Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Eggplant Stalk grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
